description_long: This lounge setup features a modern, boxy white sofa with two prominent black back cushions, paired with a rectangular wooden coffee table and a matching side table. The sofa has a minimalist design with straight armrests and a solid back, providing a clean and contemporary look. The coffee table is positioned directly in front of the sofa and supports a vintage-style television with a dark brown casing and a colorful test pattern on its screen. The side table sits adjacent to the sofa, offering additional surface space. The legs of both tables are straight and sturdy, matching the dark wood finish of the tabletops. The overall arrangement suggests a comfortable urban living or waiting area, suitable for public or semi-public spaces.
description: A modern white sofa with black cushions, paired with matching wooden coffee and side tables, and a vintage TV on the main table. The setup is clean, boxy, and ideal for urban lounge areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white sofa with black cushions, the coffee table with a TV, and the side table to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's armrest, the thickness of the tables, and the TV's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sofa, the back of the TV, and the alignment of the tables.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sofa's other armrest, the TV's side, and the side table's position.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, rectangular black back cushions are attached to the sofa's backrest, evenly spaced and flush with the seat; no loose or seat cushions are visible.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, full-height, and flat, with no visible tufting or segmentation, providing a simple and modern appearance.
attribute_armrest_presence: Straight, solid armrests at both ends, matching the sofa's height and style.
attribute_leg_style: All tables and the sofa have short, straight, square-section legs made of wood, with no decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid white with no visible pattern, tufting, or stitching details; the back cushions are solid black.
